creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Omelchuk from comment #6)

Please read your own log!
The compiler tells you there is /usr/local/lib/librustc_llvm-d16b8f0e.so and that this causes a problem. That file was installed by rust-1.9.0 or rust-nightly at the time of 1.9.0.
I don't know why it's there but it is, and you need to look into why you have leftover files from previous installations!
